copy.outroSubline: Just a quick scan and you're done

narration.label: Welcome
narration.text: LevelUp is a rewards system built for schools. Students scan in, earn points, and pick their prizes.

narration.label: ID cards
narration.text: Each student gets a digital ID card you can print or scan.

narration.label: Kiosk sign-in
narration.text: At the kiosk, students sign in and see their points right away.

narration.label: Prize shop
narration.text: They browse the prize shop and scan to redeem.

narration.label: Scan only
narration.text: No keyboard, no mouse, no touchscreen. Just a quick scan and you're done.
